description_long: This is a stylized female doll with a retro-inspired appearance, featuring a voluminous, dark brown hairstyle adorned with colorful geometric shapes. The doll wears a sleeveless white top with a grid pattern, paired with a high-waisted, knee-length red skirt and a wide belt. Her arms are extended outward, clad in long black gloves that reach above the elbows, and she wears a gold bracelet on her right wrist. The doll's facial features are highly defined, with bold makeup, arched eyebrows, and red lips, giving her a dramatic expression. She stands in red high-heeled shoes, and her overall look is reminiscent of mid-20th-century fashion. The materials and finish suggest a plastic or vinyl construction, typical of collectible or decorative dolls.
description: A retro-styled female doll with a colorful, geometric-adorned hairstyle, dramatic makeup, and a red skirt with black gloves and high heels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face, grid-patterned white top, red skirt, and outstretched black-gloved arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the volume of the hair, and the layered skirt with visible high heels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the geometric-decorated hair, the full skirt, and the symmetrical arm extension.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the bracelet on the right wrist and the side profile of the face and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: Retro-inspired ensemble with a sleeveless white grid-patterned top, high-waisted red A-line skirt, wide belt, long black opera gloves, and red high-heeled shoes, evoking mid-20th-century fashion.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_facial_expression: Dramatic and intense expression with arched eyebrows, wide-open eyes, and slightly pursed red lips.
attribute_hair_style: Voluminous, medium-length dark brown hair decorated with colorful geometric shapes, styled in a rounded, retro fashion.
